mcqs.question: Which algorithm uses adaptive re-weighting of misclassified instances?
mcqs.explanation: AdaBoost specifically adjusts instance weights after each iteration.

mcqs.question: What is the correct order of operations in AdaBoost?

options.text: Weight update → Train model → Compute error → Compute α
Train model → Compute error → Compute α → Weight update
Compute α → Weight update → Train model → Compute error
Train model → Compute α → Compute error → Weight update

mcqs.explanation: Standard AdaBoost flow: Train model, calculate error, compute learner weight (α), update instance weights.

mcqs.question: Which technique helps prevent overfitting in XGBoost?
mcqs.explanation: XGBoost uses multiple regularization techniques including all listed options.
